features: Air Wick Freshmatic Autospray automatically releases bursts of continuous fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralise odours
One spritz is enough to fill a room, and make your home always smells welcoming
Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy the great smell
Fragrances your home for up to 70 days per refill when on low setting
description: Our Air Wick Automatic Sprays are infused with natural essential oils and designed for 24/7 odour neutralisation for up to 70 days on lowest setting. Tackle pet odour removal and bathroom smells with our variety of fragrances to use around your home. Air Freshener.
